_about: Read-path (MCP tool) latency baseline. Regenerate with: FALKOR_URL=redis://127.0.0.1:6380 CIH_BENCH_GRAPH=fineract CIH_BENCH_NAME=disburseLoan cargo run -p cih-falkor --example query_bench. See docs/plans/read-path-latency.md.

notes.name_lookup: candidates_by_name — n.name index added (item 1). Unindexed full label scan measured ~6-8ms warm before the index; index scan ~0.9ms.
notes.context_sequential: same 4 sub-queries awaited one-by-one — the pre-item-5 shape; the gap vs context is the concurrency win (~2.2x here).

tools._note: 20 per-node impact traversals awaited serially (pre-change shape)
same 20 impacts fanned out via JoinSet (~3.3x); larger blast radii widen the gap

artifact_load._about: Cost of parsing nodes.jsonl+edges.jsonl, paid per call by taint_paths/shape_check before item 4, now served from ArtifactCache (Arc clone) after the first call. Measure with: cargo run -p cih-server --example artifact_load_bench.
